# services.kavita

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.kavita`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.kavita.dataDir` | `string` | The directory where Kavita stores its state. |
| `services.kavita.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Kavita reading server. |
| `services.kavita.package` | `package` | The kavita package to use. |
| `services.kavita.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Kavita configuration options, as configured in {file}`appsettings.json`. |
| `services.kavita.settings.IpAddresses` | `strings concatenated with ","` | IP Addresses to bind to. The default is to bind to all IPv4 and IPv6 addresses. |
| `services.kavita.settings.Port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port to bind to. |
| `services.kavita.tokenKeyFile` | `absolute path` | A file containing the TokenKey, a secret with at 512+ bits. It can be generated with `head -c 64 /dev/urandom \| base64 --wrap=0`. |
| `services.kavita.user` | `string` | User account under which Kavita runs. |
